title: The Seducing Woods Trap
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy, Sanji as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: The group is pulled into Whole Cake Island’s strange living landscape, where the forest itself becomes an enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Where?! what?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What's up with you two?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We just saw Sanji over there! It's like he's playing hide and seek!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Seri- Ously?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huh?! where'd he run off to now?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've lost sight of him! But wow, every- thing looks so delicious!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's a... Forest of Candy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I love how it smells here()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He-Y! Saanji~! Come ouu..t!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It must be true if all three of you saw him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But why would he keep dis- appearing ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Please trust me on this one!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I honestly don't feel like I've ever hid anything from my friends!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder ...if he feels ashamed about something?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's split up and look for him! I'll go over there, where there's more cake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll go straight ahead, in the direction of that sweet caramel scent!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I'll go this way! Those jelly beans are calling out to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold your horses!!! I have a really bad feeling about this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's your problem? We've lost sight of him, so we just have to look for him by following our gut!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: said the guy who lets his base instincts lead him around without fear of consequences...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I can't shake this feeling, that all of you are being driven by some other desires in order to choose your paths?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fine!! I'll look for him with you guys...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but we have to stick together! No one is to go wandering off on their own, do I make myself perfectly clear?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This flower is also made out of candy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No way

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Quit getting distracted!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you look closely, this entire place is filled with sweets!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Doesn't that seem strange to anyone?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're currently on enemy territory! We'll continue to look around for a bit...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if we can't find Sanji soon enough, we're going to immediately re- treat and return to our original spot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Whaaa~ T?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So sweet!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guys! This green river is made out of melon juice!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Seri-ously?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if you look closely, this bridge is made out of doughnut!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Will you guys cut it out beFO-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry up and cross the rest of the bridge!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Crap !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's a Croco- Dile!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Luffy, should we fight it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No need...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 41 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
